title: schoenus quadrangularis
intro: Schoenus quadrangularis, also known as the swamp sedge or thread sedge, is a species of grass-like plant that is native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Schoenus quadrangularis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Schoenus quadrangularis is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
